Treasure Valley & Southwest Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

18 senior living communities in the Treasure Valley & Southwest region of Idaho, organized by city.

How Idaho regulates senior care

Residential assisted living facilities are licensed by the Bureau of Facility Standards; very small settings operate as Certified Family Homes. License & inspection lookup: Idaho Department of Health and Welfare, Bureau of Facility Standards.

New to this?

Start with how to choose a facility, levels of care, and the touring checklist.

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities.
